resultList.dtldesc: Premium NorthFacing 3 BHK Villa in Chennai  Sri Sai Nagar, OttiambakkamPresenting a wellplanned independent villa in the secure gated layout of Sri Sai Nagar, Ottiambakkam. Located in one of South Chennais steadily developing residential corridors, this freehold 3 BHK villa offers spacious interiors, Vaastucompliant design, and practical multilevel living. Ideal for families seeking privacy and longterm value, the property combines peaceful surroundings with convenient connectivity.Property SpecificationsThis newly constructed villa offers a carpet area of 1750 sq. ft and is configured across G2 floors, connected internally by a private staircase. The layout has been thoughtfully arranged to ensure functional separation of spaces.The ground floor features one bedroom , one bathroom along with the making it convenient for guests or elderly family members. The first floor comprises one bedroom and one bathroom , living room and kitchen . The second floor accommodates two bedrooms and two bathrooms, ensuring comfortable private zones for family members. In total, the villa includes four bedrooms and four  western style bathrooms.The home is unfurnished, providing complete flexibility for interior customization. Flooring throughout, including the master bedroom, will be finished with 2x2 or 4x2 vitrified tiles for durability and easy maintenance. The kitchen is designed in a standard format with a granite platform and stainless steel sink. There is no modular setup or piped gas connection. There is a panchayat water pipe connection to every house in that layout.Additional spaces include a puja room, study, and store room, enhancing functionality. The villa does not have balconies, maintaining a compact and secure vertical design. Electrical fixtures such as lights and fans are not installed. The main entrance is northfacing and the property is fully Vaastu compliant. The villa overlooks the main road, ensuring easy accessibility.FacilitiesThe property includes two covered car parking spaces within the premises. The gated community offers essential amenities including security, CCTV surveillance in common areas, and a childrens play area. Water supply is available 24 hours, and electricity supply is stable with rare power cuts. There is no 100 percent power backup.The layout is approved by the Chennai Metropolitan Development Authority, with permission for up to three floors, aligning with the existing G2 configuration.LocalityOttiambakkam enjoys growing infrastructure and good public transport connectivity, including access to Perumbakkam Metro and regular bus services. Reputed schools such as Amethyst, BVM, Orchid School, and Zion School are located nearby. Sekaran Mall and surrounding commercial establishments cater to daily shopping and lifestyle needs.This spacious villa offers an excellent opportunity for families seeking an independent, secure, and wellconnected home in Chennai.
